summary: Frontend testing complete for navigation tabs, VIP wallet connection, language switching, and market translations. All 4 requested features tested and PASSED. No extra 'index...' tab in navigation (exactly 7 tabs), VIP wallet connection modal works with manual address input, language switching works (FR/EN/ES), market page uses t() function for translations.

issues: 'Se déconnecter' button remains in French even after switching language to English - translation key may be missing

critical_code_review_comments: Navigation tabs correctly show 7 tabs: Accueil, Marché, News, Forum, Cours, IA, Profil
VIP Hub Portfolio section has 'Connecter Wallet' button that opens modal for manual address input
Language selector modal shows 3 options: Français, English, Español with flags
Market page uses useTranslation() hook correctly - t('market.title'), t('market.globalMarket') etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested features working correctly: (1) Navigation has 7 tabs, no extra index tab, (2) VIP wallet connection modal works, (3) Language switching works for FR/EN/ES, (4) Market page translations use t() function. Minor issue: logout button translation key may be missing.

navigation_tabs.details: 7 tabs found: Accueil, Marché, News, Forum, Cours, IA, Profil. No extra 'index...' tab present.

vip_wallet_connection.details: Portfolio section shows 'Connecter Wallet' button. Modal opens with: title 'Connecter un Wallet', input for Ethereum address (0x...), 'Connecter le Wallet' button, instructions, and 'Fermer' close button. Test wallet address successfully filled.

language_switching.details: Language selector modal shows 3 options with flags: Français (checkmarked when selected), English, Español. Switching to English updates UI text immediately - Profile menu items changed from French to English.

market_page_translations.details: Market page shows: 'Marché Crypto' title (from t('market.title')), 'Marché Global' section, 'Capitalisation' label, 'Volume 24h', 'Dominance' with BTC/ETH percentages, 'Top Cryptomonnaies' list.

wallet_connection_flow.step_1: Navigate to VIP Hub via 'Accéder à l'espace VIP' card on home page
wallet_connection_flow.step_4: Modal opens with manual address input option
